MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, The Tides Center is present. Represented by Justin McBride.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Denney Johnsen , is present.
Attorney, Jerome Schweich, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-12-2010 is vacated.
